name: Easter Woven Bunny and Egg Garland - Threshold™
description:
This Easter Woven Bunny and Egg Garland from Threshold™ brings a fresh, joyful touch to your festive decor. This Easter-themed woven garland features cream-colored bunnies with green bow ties, alternating with green or cream-colored eggs along a cream-colored cord, creating a whimsical springtime display. Crafted from paper and designed in a horizontal orientation, this versatile 72-inch-long garland brings playful, cheery detail to mantels, doorways or walls.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
